page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 24 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require substantial RAM without the overhead of GPU acceleration. The 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it suitable for memory-intensive applications, including in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and data processing pipelines that fit within the 192.0 GB memory envelope.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance provides 24 dedicated vCPUs without hyperthreading. It features 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, such as in-memory databases, caching systems, and data processing tasks that require dedicated compute resources and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio.

tagline: A dedicated 24-core Intel Xeon instance featuring 192 GB of RAM and 12 Gbps network bandwidth for memory-intensive workloads.
